heading: Step 2: Type a question about your collection
body:
Type a natural language prompt for your collection into the query
bar. For example: `Which movies were released in 2000?`

- Press enter or click the **Generate query** button.

- A filter query populates in the **Filter** bar.

> **Tip:** It is also possible to paste SQL or queries from application code into the
> **Natural Language Query Bar**.
